title: FedEx Unassigned PM Run - Lenexa, Kansas FedEx Contractors Only!
description:
THIS LISTING IS $110,000, CASH DEAL FOR AN EXISTING FEDEX CONTRACTOR ONLY!

Imagine stepping into a thriving logistics business that's been serving Lenexa, Kansas with reliability and excellence. This well-established FedEx operation isn't just a business - it's your gateway to financial independence in one of America's most stable industries.

You'll love the simplicity of this turnkey operation. With one unassigned PM run already mapped out and running smoothly, you're not starting from scratch - you're taking over a proven system that generates $230,000 in gross revenue annually. The numbers speak for themselves: $50,000 in net earnings translates to healthy margins that many business owners only dream about.

The business includes an experienced driver and although a truck is not included, it is something that can be added.

This $110,000, cash deal for an existing FedEx contractor only. 

The logistics industry continues to boom, and FedEx's brand recognition gives you instant credibility with customers. You'll be part of a network that businesses depend on every single day. Whether you're an experienced entrepreneur or someone looking to transition into business ownership, this operation offers the stability and income potential you've been searching for.

This isn't just about buying a business - it's about securing your financial future in Kansas City's thriving commercial landscape.

Ad#:2487606
